Subscription Terms and Cancellation Policy

Subscription cancellations must be submitted at least 7 days before the next billing cycle to avoid being charged for the following period. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period; access is not terminated immediately.

Annual subscribers who cancel within the first 14 days of a new annual term are eligible for a prorated refund for the unused months. Monthly subscribers are not eligible for partial refunds upon cancellation.

To cancel, navigate to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel Subscription. Cancellation confirmation will be sent to the email address on file within 1 business day.

Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless cancelled. Renewal charges are applied to the payment method on file. Subscribers will receive a renewal reminder 7 days before each annual renewal.

Downgrading a subscription tier takes effect at the next billing cycle. Upgrading takes effect immediately and the difference is charged on a prorated basis for the remaining days in the current billing period.
